content.text:
Looking at the image, the track runs straight ahead with the car positioned on the left gravel edge, and the asphalt road is visible to the right — the car needs to continue steering right to return to the track center.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 118, target = (118 + 5) % 121 = 123 % 121 = 2
- Target WP index 2: x=3.3593, y=0.6834
- Car: x=2.9698, y=0.9406, heading=-3.338°
- dy = 0.6834 - 0.9406 = -0.2572
- dx = 3.3593 - 2.9698 = 0.3895
- bearing = atan2(-0.2572, 0.3895) = -33.44°
- delta = -33.44° - (-3.338°) = -30.10°
- Waypoint is to the RIGHT → negative steering

Delta = -30.10°, still significant right correction needed. Car is 0.258m left of center (track width 0.762m, so ~0.34m from left edge). Continue strong right steering.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is still on gravel left of track center (y=0.941 vs centerline y=0.683, dist=0.258m) with delta=-30.1° to target waypoint, requiring strong right steering to return to asphalt.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.683 on this straight section; car y~0.94 means car is far left of center",
    "Car has been persistently left of center despite -25° steering — very slow correction",
    "When delta > 30°, use speed=0.75 and steering=-25 for maximum correction",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 99.49% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Car is on gravel/grass edge — need maximum right correction now",
    "Heading ~-3° but need bearing ~-33° — large negative delta persists despite -25° steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.877, 2.928, 2.970],
    "y": [0.977, 0.958, 0.941],
    "yaw": [4.08, -0.04, -3.34]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP2 at (3.359, 0.683): dy=-0.257, dx=0.390, bearing=-33.44°, delta=-30.10° → strong right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
